scream.translate: орать, вопить, вскрикнуть, зареветь, визг, вопль, умора, клекот
mnemonic: scream [скри:м] визг, пронзителный крик - (С крим- атория)пронзительные крики слышны.

scream [skri:m]
***
Мы КРИЧИМ и искрим. (это) scream
Пронзительный крик., вопль., визг.

examples.eng: He screamed at her to stop.
I screamed for help.
'Get out!' she screamed.
It was a scream!
She's a scream!
The wind screamed through the trees.
Eagles scream.
I heard her scream and ran to help.
examples.ru: Я услышал её крик и побежал на помощь.

examples.eng: A scream broke the silence.
He screamed out her name.
He screamed at her to go away.
examples.ru: Он закричал ей, чтобы она уходила.

examples.eng: The film was a scream!
They let out the screams of terror.
She screamed out a few words to me.
The street screamed poverty.
examples.ru: Вид улицы говорил о крайней нищете.

examples.eng: The dress she was wearing screamed money.
examples.ru: На ней было очень дорогое платье.

examples.eng: A scream curdled in her throat.
examples.ru: Крик застрял у неё в горле.

examples.eng: He heard the scream of the brakes.
She let out the scream of pain.
The crowd screamed with excitement.
This is so irritating I could scream.
examples.ru: Это так раздражает, что кричать хочется.

examples.eng: If you lay one hand on me, I'll scream.
examples.ru: Только пальцем меня тронь — и я закричу.

examples.eng: The children were screaming with laughter.
She screamed herself hoarse.
A scream pierced the silence.
Fran uttered a shrill scream.
The scream pierced the night.
She let out a piercing scream.
A sudden scream pierced the silence.
A loud scream shattered the silence.
